notices.author: PaperStream Admin
notices.message:
Hey guys!

There’s a Physics test on **23 May 2026 at 2:30 PM** in **Room No. 216**.

Please make sure to come on time because after 2:30 PM, no one will be allowed to enter the exam room. So try to reach a little early 😊

Also, this test is basically for students who need a little extra help or another chance to improve their marks in Physics. It is usually for students who:

* scored low marks before, (Not sure about it ) 
* missed an earlier test/exam, (That the reason for exam) 
* or need another chance to clear the subject.(Not sure about it)
notices.title: Physics Test
